heading: Get Freedom from Glasses with Latest Contoura Lasik treatment
text: Prakash Netr Kendra – PNK Eye Care Home Treatments Refractive Surgery Cataract Treatment Glaucoma Treatment Retina Treatment Cornea Treatment Pediatric Treatment About Doctors Contact Menu Home Treatments Refractive Surgery Cataract Treatment Glaucoma Treatment Retina Treatment Cornea Treatment Pediatric Treatment About Doctors Contact Appointment LASIK Get Freedom from Glasses with Latest Contoura Lasik treatment Book  Appointment Get your Vision Back with Latest Cataract Treatment Book  Appointment Choose the Latest Procedure For Retina Treatment Book  Appointment 0 + Years of Expertise 0 M+ Cataract & LASIK Surgeries 0 L+ Patients Served Our Features Our Specialties Welcome to Prakash Netra Kendr, (Best eye hospital in Lucknow) your premier destination for comprehensive eye care. Our experienced team of ophthalmologists is dedicated to providing personalized treatment plans tailored to your unique needs. From advanced refractive surgeries like LASIK and PRK to precise cataract surgeries and specialized retina treatments, we offer a full spectrum of services to enhance and protect your vision. Our pediatric ophthalmology department ensures that even our youngest patients receive the specialized care they deserve. With a focus on cutting-edge technology and compassionate care, we’re committed to helping you see the world with clarity and confidence. Experience the difference at Prakash Netra Kendr and schedule your appointment today. Get in Touch About Us One Of The Leading Eye Care Hospitals In North India Strive for Sight With a vision to providing comprehensive eye care services, Dr. Rajat Dhesi and Dr. Shobhit Chawla set up Prakash Netra Kendr (P.N.K.) Private Limited in 1991. After decades of hardwork, serving the populace with best in class services, we have established ourselves as one of the most reputed eye hospitals in North India. Book Appointment Contact Us Meet Our Experienced Doctors Dr. Rajat Dhesi MBBS , M.S ( KGMC Lucknow ) Specialization : Cataract and Glaucoma Dr. Shobhit Chawla MBBS, MS FMRS Specialization : Retina & Cataract Dr.Bela Kamboj MS, FMRF Fellow LVPEI Specialization : Cornea , refractive & Cataract Dr. Azad Gaurav MBBS, DO , FLVPEI Specialization : Cataract and Glaucoma All Doctors Infra Says More Why Choose Us We Have Best Professional Team To Care of Your Eyes The Prakash Netra Kendr is well-known across the globe for its work on vitreo-retinal, oculoplastic, cataract, and refractive error correction issues. We have been providing eye care for more than 30+ years. Expert Doctors Best TPA Facilities Personalized Care Modern Equipment's What Our Clients Say About Us?
